reference: I am fifty-two years of age and live in Alaska. I had blood work done, but I am not sure if type two diabetes is my problem because of the results I received. I am fully menopausal and trying to figure out what I really need. I just found out my doctor is no longer in practice and I am trying to find a new one.
text: I am 52 years of age and live in Alaska. I had blood work done, but I am not sure if type 2 diabetes is my problem because of the results I received. I am fully menopausal and trying to figure out what I really need. I just found out my doctor is no longer in practice and I am trying to find a new one.
